meta.heading: Mōchirīī Recruitment & Membership
meta.author: From Twills
meta.intro: A public guide to who fits Mōchirīī, how joining works, and how members can help the guild grow with care.

audio.title: A Note From Twills
audio.description: Prefer listening? Twills' note covers the same spirit in a softer format.

content.title: Who We Are Looking For
paragraphs: Mōchirīī is a cozy Where Winds Meet guild for players who want friendly company, practical help, relaxed events, and a community that feels alive without becoming another obligation.

You may fit well here if you are kind in chat, patient with newer players, willing to ask questions, and comfortable joining events at a steady but humane pace. Skill grows over time; conduct shows up right away.

Joining starts in Discord. Say hello, share your in-game name and time zone, and ask for WWM guild access. A mod or leader will verify you, assign the right role, and point you toward the channels and event notes that matter first.
Activity is flexible, but communication matters. Show up when you can, RSVP when an event needs planning, and tell a leader before a longer break or Cupcake nap so no one has to guess where you went.

Members help recruitment by making runs feel smooth and welcoming. Invite respectfully, answer questions clearly, and remember that retention matters more than raw numbers. People stay when they feel seen, guided, and included.

Leadership is here to support the guild's rhythm: mod help, hall coordination, event setup, conflict repair, and long-term direction. If you are unsure who to contact, start with a mod or leader in Discord and we will route you gently.
conclusion: Mōchirīī is meant to feel warm, alive, and welcoming. If that sounds like the kind of wuxia home you want, join Discord, read the joining path, and come say hello.
